core_mechanism: a variationally-derived equation of motion in which a non-minimal (state-dependent) coupling between a scalar field and the source/density term adds a gradient-of-the-coupling force term, constrained to act orthogonally to the trajectory's tangent (velocity) vector
brief_reason: The abstract derives the test-particle equation of motion from an explicit coupling between an arbitrary function of the scalar curvature and the matter Lagrangian, yielding an extra force orthogonal to the four-velocity — i.e., a gradient-driven force generated by a non-minimal field–source coupling.
